# Deep-space radiometric light-time cross-validation — pinned ANISE oracle
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only
#
# Scenario : One-way retarded (down-leg) light time, Earth→{Mars,Sun,Moon}, SSB-differenced DE440
# Oracle   : ANISE 0.10 converged-Newtonian aberration light time (Aberration::CN; SPICE spkapo equiv) over DE440 de440s.bsp
# Model    : kshana::radiometric::light_time_solution (retarded fixed-point iteration)
# Oracle author/license: Christopher Rabotin et al., ANISE (Mozilla Public License 2.0).
# DE440 (de440s.bsp): public-domain NASA/JPL data, referenced not redistributed.
#
# Match: kshana::radiometric::light_time_solution tau vs ANISE Aberration::CN tau,
#   both differencing the SAME DE440 SSB-relative geometry (kshana fed obs/target
#   SSB positions via ANISE::ssb_position), so the residual isolates the retarded
#   fixed-point solver vs SPICE's 3-step converged Newtonian, not the ephemeris.
# Worst |d_tau| = 1.019e-9 s ; worst |d_range| = 3.055e-1 m over 24 legs.
# Worst quadratic-Taylor reconstruction error = 1.030e-10 s (the main-repo test re-runs
#   kshana's solver against the per-row Taylor geometry; this bounds its faithfulness to DE440).
#
# Reproduce: cd xval/anise-mars-od && \
#   KSHANA_ANISE_DE440S=kernels/de440s.bsp cargo run --release --bin lighttime-xval
#   (writes lighttime_report.json + report.md + this fixture into the main crate).
# kernel de440s.bsp sha256=c1c7feeab882263fc493a9d5a5b2ddd71b54826cdf65d8d17a76126b260a49f2
#
# Each row also carries the local DE440 geometry the main-crate test re-runs kshana's
#   solver against (NO ANISE at test time): the frozen observer SSB position obs_r,
#   and the target's SSB-relative quadratic Taylor fit about t_rx — position tgt_r,
#   velocity tgt_v, acceleration tgt_a — so r(t) = tgt_r + tgt_v*D + 0.5*tgt_a*D^2
#   (D = t - t_rx, seconds) reproduces the curved retarded geometry to sub-mm over
#   the ~10^3 s light time (the leftover cubic jerk term is < 1 mm).
#
# columns: target jd_tdb kshana_tau_s anise_tau_s d_tau_s kshana_range_m anise_range_m d_range_m obs_rx obs_ry obs_rz tgt_rx tgt_ry tgt_rz tgt_vx tgt_vy tgt_vz tgt_ax tgt_ay tgt_az
